title: Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur
tagline: Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Teru Malleshvara Hindu temple (also spelt Teru Malleshwara) is a Vijayanagara era temple in Hiriyur town near the historically important Chitradurga city in the Indian state of
overview.description: The Teru Malleshvara Hindu temple (also spelt Teru Malleshwara) is a Vijayanagara era temple in Hiriyur town near the historically important Chitradurga city in the Indian state of Karnataka. Hiriyur is situated on the right bank of the Vedavati river. The "Teru Malleshvara" fair (Jatra, a religious gathering with festivities) is celebrated annually for a week starting from the full moon in January or February (called magha).

topPlaces.name: Hiriyur
topPlaces.description: Hiriyur or Hiriyuru is a town and a taluk headquarter located in Chitradurga district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Hiriyur is situated along National Highway 48.

topPlaces.name: Maskal, Chitradurga
topPlaces.description: Maskal is a village in Hiriyur taluk in the Chitradurga district of Karnataka state, India. It belongs to the Bangalore Division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bellary Airport (138 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (149 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur?
faq.a: Stays in Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Teru Malleshvara Temple, Hiriyur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hiriyur, Maskal, Chitradurga.
